Monsters and Mazes is an amazing game with a strong and welcoming community. The gameplay is fun and engaging, and there’s always something going on to keep players involved. One of the best parts is the community skin competitions, which give everyone a chance to show off their creativity and be recognized.

The moderation team is really nice and helpful, making the game feel safe and enjoyable for everyone. They host tons of events and create so many opportunities for players to get involved in big activities. Overall, Monsters and Mazes is a well-managed, exciting game that’s definitely worth playing.

developer_response.body: The community events are some of my favorite and proudest parts about this game and community. Glad to hear they are having such a positive impact! Thank you!

This is the game i needed after Forsaken’s downfall, i love this game. It’s creepy, funny, chaotic and just a lot of fun. The graphics are really good, the cosmetics and skins are amazing and the mazes are creative and fun (especially fun center) I would give it 5 stars if it wasn’t for these issues:

1. Horrible report system

You can report people without giving a reason, which means that you can false report way too easily

2. Half of the community is toxic and underage

Whenever i play a maze, a lot of people either say racial slurs, camps, underage or just being really toxic. This is extremely annoying, because i’m trying to enjoy the game without someone ruining it. Playing with underage people makes me really uncomfortable too

3. Playing as the monster isn’t as fun anymore

When the april fools update came out, playing as the monster sucked. Because i always stopped for like a second everytime i tried to move. So please fix that

If these two issues were fixed, i’d give the game 5 stars. But sadly, it lacks a lot of the game and therefore i’m giving it four stars. But it’s still an amazing game despite these issues

reviews.review_title: Fun while it fun, JUST FIX YOUR GAME
reviews.review_description: FIX YOUR GAME. I was in lobbies with around 100 karma, the wheel would pick me, then when the round started it was never me. The chances aren’t right, I played for hours just to be the dinosaur, and little Timmy who got the game 5 minutes ago with 3 karma over here is getting it 3 times in a row. When I finally did get picked, they reported me for “spawn camping” when I killed them across the map from spawn.

Really good game overall, especially for VR. The mechanics and general gameplay are unique from anything i've seen in other VR games and i've found myself playing this game often due to the fresh air of finally discovering something new and with lots of passion put into it! My respects go out to the developers who work hard on this game, truly. Hope to see more amazing things come out from this game in the future!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the humble review!  The CC exclusive skins are given to those who make content on youtube, tick tock, or twitch!

developer_response.body: Reach out to support@redteam.games  for  any  issues with VIP access

reviews.review_description: I love the different games

This game is super fun, I recommend it to anyone wanting to have a fun time with horror and mazes. It’s got a ton of maps and a monster that is special to its maze.

It’s got so many skins and unique items to mess around with, and the soda system allows you to have unique abilities, such as the big soda. 

All in all, this game is absolutely amazing and it’s my favorite vr game!

There's a lot wrong with this game that outweighs the good and let's be honest,Garett isn't actually gonna read this, look at how little he responds to reviews or critisicm,if at all saying 'please talk on our discord server to disclose feedback'....ISN'T THAT WHAT REVIEWS ARE FOR, I digress...first, a lot of the maps are pretty badly designed, why are they so dark, I get it's horror but it becomes unplayable at times and the flashlight barely does anything, also pls add a toggle for flashlight, it's not that hard, if I'm trying to hide or I'm too close to objects, the focused light obscures my vision, also add upgrades or perks for survivors and monsters, because the game is unbalanced and needs a meta change, if you're survivor, the monster can easily camp a generator or camp spawn....how about you do something about that? And as monster, if there's more than 5 people, you get gen rushed to hell, one time as survivor, the exits were opened and we still had 4 FOUR MINUTES (and 20 seconds), do you not see the problem with that, especially with maps like fun centre where they can close all the doors and make it a living hell to try and get anyone or if you try to move even for 20 seconds, you switch, onto that, why do you have some monsters switch,that makes it easier for them to camp while also making it extremely inconvenient for both sides as monsters can be interrupted mid chase or survivors could be doing something and the monster switches next to them, I'm not sure if you wanted it to be gimmicky but it just does not work with how it's implemented it, also make parkour in labyrinth easier, I haven't won a single round except as monster and I've been playing for a week, be so serious, and remove the 67 from the game, lobbies are filled with brainrot now and 'SHIX SEVUUUUN' JUST GET RID OF IT, WE NEVER WANTED IT HERE,also make money easier to get and fix proximity voice chat, you can barely locate players based on theirvoice and that's basic multiplayer function

Edir:Also the maps are badly designed as its easy to get stuck and hiding spots and useless,especially labyrinth, the minotaur was chasing me, I tried to go through the open door BUT THE KEY WAS BLOCKING MY WAY, WHY KEEP THE KEY IN THE DOOR HOLE IT PUSHED ME BACK AND I DIED WITH 30 SECONDS LEFT, tempted to uninstall the game after

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! Glad to hear we have made something great!

reviews.review_title: Loads of fun even if there’s bugs
reviews.review_description:
There are lots of people to meet in the different variety’s of maps, the lobby, or even just by their skins. Then there is the great community of people, that you can easily connect with and are some of the nicest people. Including the devs, beta/alpha testers, etc.. There is of course bugs. Every game has bugs, and people still complain over it. BUT, the special thing about Monsters and Mazes is that the bugs can make the game fun. Whether you’re flying, stuck in a tube, or duplicating the items. In the end this game is one of the funniest, enjoyable, and fun games.

(Make sure to say hi to jjdev, fishvr, and the people in the news team clan, they are nice people 👍)

developer_response.body: We are working on those bugs! Thanks for being patient! Hopefully once things have settled we can leave early access and be bug free and stable!

reviews.review_title: Fun game to play with friends.
reviews.review_description: If you enjoy playing PvE games then this game is for you. Playing as the monsters always introduces something new which adds diversity to the game and playing as a runner trying to escape is challenging but in a fun way. The maps are designed amazingly both for quality and gameplay. There are also lots more to do in the game including the super sodas, combining skins to match your preferences, and overall hanging out with the community.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you enjoy the game and that the community is good!

reviews.review_description: There is so much you can do in this game you can talk to random people complete mazes together and have a bit of a scare.

reviews.review_title: Monsters and Mazes is really good.
reviews.review_description: MAM is a really good game. ON THE VOTING MAPS THING PLEASE VOTE FOR E. E is playtime maze vs toys, is that means the map is POPPY PLAYTIME. So vote E, and also MaM has been a good game for me.

I’ve been playing this game since launch, they have always allowed the community to shape the game, like making skins that end up in game and they let players vote for the next upcoming updates.

The game has a lot of secrets to explore and discover with rewards for finding them, 10/10 game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, glad to hear you are enjoying the game!

I think the idea of this is GREAT, I love that you can be your own monster with other abilities while hunting down others. One thing though is that it’s almost IMPOSSIBLE to get money, it’s way too hard.

developer_response.body: Most skins hover around 150 mm, you can get 35 Monster Money from just completing mazes alone, and with the daily reward as well, that averages out to 45 Monster Money a day! Meaning you can get some of our best cosmetics in as little as 3-4 days! Glad you are enjoying the game!
